config.css: * { box-sizing: border-box; font-family: system-ui; } .controls { display: flex; gap: 12px; align-items: end; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 16px; } label { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; font-size: 13px; } select { padding: 6px 12px; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 4px; } button { padding: 8px 16px; background: #2563eb; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; } .sources { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 16px; } @media (max-width: 900px) { .sources { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } } .source-panel { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px; } .source-panel h3 { margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 13px; } .badge { font-size: 10px; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 8px; background: #f3f4f6; } .live-values { display: flex; gap: 6px; } .card { flex: 1; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 4px; padding: 6px; text-align: center; } .card-label { font-size: 10px; color: #666; } .card-value { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; } .msg-count { font-size: 10px; color: #999; margin-top: 4px; } .chart-area { height: 200px; background: #1e1e1e; border-radius: 6px; margin-bottom: 16px; position: relative; } .table-section { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px; } .table-section h3 { margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 14px; } table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 12px; } th, td { padding: 4px 6px; border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0; text-align: left; } th { font-weight: 600; color: #666; background: #f9fafb; } #tableArea { max-height: 300px; overflow-y: auto; }
